failures.description: The agent misinterpreted the availability constraint and planned to search including unavailable products instead of restricting the search to available Electric Kettles.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Electric Kettle. At index 1, the agent planned a query with available_only=false and explicitly said it would include unavailable products. The required constraint 'available' was already present in the user request, so no missing information was involved. This is not a malformed tool call or tool-output issue; it is a misunderstanding/violation of the user's availability constraint.
